svg.text: ESP32 + two I2C sensors. Only 8 jumper wires total. Pi and smart plug connect via WiFi only.
No wires to ESP32 -- they talk over WiFi
Just plug humidifier in -- no wiring needed
Tip: Both sensors share the same I2C bus -- different addresses (0x44 and 0x23) so no conflict.
Dashed lines above show shared connections. You can daisy-chain: ESP32 pin --> SHT31 --> BH1750.
The Pi and Tasmota plug need zero wires -- they connect to the ESP32 and each other over WiFi.
SporePrint v3.3.1 | Tier 1: Bare Bones | github.com/59psi/SporePrint
